case_title: BREWER, ARECIA et al vs. GREEN, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BREWER, ARECIA HAMILTON, EDDIE HAMILTON, JR., EDDIE BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM GEROGENE PANTELAS

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-31-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-31-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-02-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM GEORGENE PANTELAS IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR EDDIE HAMILTON JR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BREWER, ARECIA HAMILTON, EDDIE HAMILTON, JR., EDDIE BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM GEROGENE PANTELAS

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
